data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for materials used tracking, specifically the ability to upload receipt photos. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. While the linked use case mentions uploading receipts, it does not provide sufficient evidence to demonstrate that the system can track materials used with receipt photo uploads effectively.
gaps: No evidence of materials used tracking with receipt photo upload being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for materials tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the receipt photo upload functionality.
